    ChMed16ABaseConverter<M extends ChMed16AMedicament,E extends ChMed16AEMediplan<M>>
    Utility class to convert CH EMED EPR documents to an eMediplan object equivalent according to the CHMED16A specifications.

    Utility class to convert CH EMED EPR documents to an eMediplan object equivalent according to the CHMED23A specifications.

    EPrescriptionConverter
    Specialized version of the CHMED16A converter that deals with the ePrescription format as defined by the latest revision supported by this module (see EPrescription).
